name: @firstpick/pi-skill-bug-reporter
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill when defects, regressions, failed tests, unexpected behavior, or spec mismatches are found. Produces structured reproducible bug reports with severity, evidence, environment, and actionable next steps.
description_zh: 代理在发现缺陷、回归、失败测试、意外行为或规范不匹配时应调用此技能。生成包含严重性、证据、环境和可操作下一步的结构化可重现错误报告
